LSE-HS12-L4-10001300-HSVPA1112-DPC-GBL-02 • HS Visual & Performing Arts: Media Arts 11–12 • Design Thinking and Cross-Cultural Communication

The Red Banner

Click  🎧  to listen.
Listen to a conversation between a teacher and a boy. Listen carefully. You will hear the conversation only once. After listening, you will answer a question.
Listen to the Conversation
QUESTION:
What was the teacher's lesson about?
Choose the best answer. You may change your answer before submitting.
SMART SUPPORT:
Go back to the conversation. Develop a complete explanation: state what the teacher says the campaign needs to do, explain what different viewers bring that he connects it to, and describe what he says a strong campaign does.
CA ELD PI.B.5  |  NCAS Pr5a  |  HS Visual & Performing Arts: Media Arts 11–12: Design Thinking and Cross-Cultural Communication
